seo.siteDescription: Immotrim is the portfolio manager for private real estate investors: track net rent, interest, principal repayment, cash flow, depreciation, remaining debt and wealth growth across your whole portfolio.

charts.cashFlowDesc: Annual net cash flow after mortgage, reserves & costs
charts.amortizationDesc: Principal, interest & remaining balance to full payoff
charts.wertSchuldenDesc: Value growth and remaining debt over the term
charts.mietrenditeDesc: Cold rent / purchase price with rent growth

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.emptyDesc: Add your first property to start tracking your portfolio.

deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this property? This action cannot be undone.

beta.banner: 🚧 Immotrim is currently in beta – we're improving it constantly. Your feedback is very welcome!

hero.eyebrow: Portfolio overview for private real-estate investors
hero.title: Keep full control of your <mark>property portfolio</mark>
hero.subtitle: Upload your documents and see at a glance what's working and where the weak spots are — cash flow, yield, repayment and wealth growth across your entire portfolio.
hero.trialNote: 14-day free trial — no credit card required.

steps.title: How it works
steps.subtitle: From your documents to a clear portfolio in two steps.
steps.s1Desc: Upload listings, purchase contracts or statements — as PDF or image. The AI reads out purchase price, rent, living area and more automatically.
steps.s2Desc: All your properties in one clean dashboard. Spot weak spots instantly, see what's working and run scenarios with the AI assistant.

showcase.title: See instantly what your portfolio is doing
showcase.subtitle: Each chart reveals a different side of your portfolio — the weak spots as much as what's working.
showcase.c1What: Principal, cash flow and value growth across all properties — year by year.
showcase.c1Why: Shows how fast your wealth really grows and which lever contributes most.
showcase.c2What: Sum of the annual net cash flow across all properties.
showcase.c2Why: Instantly tells you whether your portfolio carries you — or a property is bleeding cash.
showcase.c3What: Principal, interest and remaining debt over the full term.
showcase.c3Why: Makes clear when you'll be debt-free and how much interest you're still paying.
showcase.c4What: Return on the equity still tied up in your portfolio.
showcase.c4Why: The most honest measure of how hard your invested money is working.
showcase.c5What: Value, remaining debt and net worth across all properties over time.
showcase.c5Why: Shows your real wealth build-up — the gap between value and debt.
showcase.c6What: Cold rent relative to purchase price (purchase-price weighted).
showcase.c6Why: Reveals which properties were bought too expensively and which deliver.

bankreport.title: The financial disclosure others fail to deliver
bankreport.subtitle: Upload your documents — Immotrim reads them and turns them into a clean, complete financial disclosure that every bank understands.
bankreport.note: Automatically reads purchase contracts, leases & financing.

about.title: About me
about.subtitle: Caspar – the developer behind Immotrim
about.p1: Ever since I started investing in real estate, I had the same problem: I'm a bit messy. With every new property my laptop and inbox got more cluttered — and I lost track of what my properties were actually producing.
about.p2: That wasn't just a problem for me to judge whether something was working. It was a pain for the banks too: every new loan request meant filling out their financial-disclosure forms by hand, over and over again.

pricing.title: Simple pricing
pricing.subtitle: One plan. Pay monthly, or save with yearly billing.
pricing.yearlyDesc: Two months free vs. monthly billing.

ai.title: Ask your portfolio — and let the AI do the math.
ai.subtitle: Ask in plain language. The AI works with your real numbers and changes values on request — you confirm every change before it is saved.
ai.confirmNote: You confirm every change before it is saved.
ai.q1: How much do I actually earn per day with my properties right now?
ai.a1Lead: Across your entire portfolio you currently build roughly
ai.a1Sub: in wealth — here is how it breaks down:
ai.q2: And what would raising depreciation (AfA) by 2% do to my after-tax cash flow?
ai.a2: Higher depreciation lowers your taxable income — so your after-tax cash flow rises accordingly. I can adjust this directly for you:

meta.title: Create your financial disclosure – clean & bank-ready | Immotrim
meta.description: Create a bank-reviewed financial disclosure – clean, complete and simple. Upload your documents, the AI sorts everything and shows you what's still missing.

hero.title: Get financing where other investors <mark>fail</mark>
hero.subtitle: A bank-reviewed financial disclosure – clean, complete and easy to create. Stay one step ahead of other investors.
hero.ctaNote: Start without signing up – just upload your documents.

trust.line: Developed together with financing advisors and bank advisors.

how.title: A finished disclosure in minutes
how.subtitle: No more form chaos. Upload, and let the AI do the rest.
how.s1Desc: Upload all documents in one place – the AI automatically sorts them to the right properties.
how.s2Desc: For each property you instantly see which documents are still missing – colour-coded by the AI.
how.s3Desc: Once everything is complete, create your bank-ready disclosure with a single click.

cta.title: Stay one step ahead of other investors
cta.subtitle: Start now – no sign-up required.

flow.startErrorHint: Please enable anonymous sign-ins in Supabase or reload the page.

flow.analyzeHint: The AI assigns the documents to your properties and checks completeness.
flow.needFiles: Upload at least one document first.
flow.sortingSubtitle: The AI reads the documents, assigns them to properties and checks what's missing.

flow.saveDocsHint: Create a free account (14 days free) to save your documents.
flow.createSaHint: Create your bank-ready financial disclosure as a PDF.

flow.proceedHint: You can also finish with missing documents.

conv.title: Create account & save
conv.subtitle: Create a free account – your uploaded documents and properties are kept.
conv.successDesc: Your documents are secured. You can sign in with this email from now on.
conv.paidDesc: Creating the disclosure is part of a paid plan. Choose a plan to continue.

manual.title: Fill in manually
manual.intro: Enter missing details yourself or mark documents you'll provide manually or submit later.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your Immotrim account.

auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.resetSentDesc: If an account exists for that email, you'll receive a link to reset your password.

youtube.posterAlt: Preview image of the Immotrim demo video
youtube.notice: By loading this video, you agree that data may be transferred to YouTube. More information is available in our <link>Privacy Policy</link>.
youtube.remember: Remember my choice and load videos automatically in the future

privacySettings.title: Privacy Settings
privacySettings.intro: Here you can review, change or reset your decision about loading external YouTube videos at any time. All other technologies used on this website are technically necessary.
privacySettings.youtubeDesc: If you consent, embedded videos will load automatically via youtube-nocookie.com in the future. Data may be transferred to YouTube/Google in the process. Without consent, a local notice is shown before each video.
privacySettings.statusNotGranted: Not granted – videos are not loaded automatically

trial.banner: {days, plural, =0 {Last day of your free trial} one {# day left in your free trial} other {# days left in your free trial}}

intro.heading: Your portfolio assistant
intro.lead: Ask anything about your properties — or tell me to change a value.
intro.can1: Explain KPIs & compare properties (cash flow, yield, wealth growth …)
intro.can2: Pull answers from your uploaded documents
intro.can3: Change values — you confirm every change before it's saved
intro.beta: Beta: conversations aren't saved and are gone once you close this panel.

suggestions.afa: Increase the depreciation (AfA) of my most valuable property by 1%
suggestions.wealth: Which of my properties has the highest wealth gain per year?
suggestions.missingData: Is any of my properties missing data that's important for the charts?
